name: zk-intent-guardian-circuits
description: Zero-Knowledge circuit for agent intent drift verification

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/intentProof.r1cs circuits/intentProof_0000.zkey circuits/intentFinal.zkey
scripts.export: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/intentFinal.zkey circuits/verification_key.json
scripts.full: npm run build && npm run setup && npm run export
